candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label and preferred candidate.
Revenue-like label but non-GAAP, so lower priority than reported revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the reported revenue line from the candidate list.

candidates.why: Direct COGS line and best match for direct production/service costs.
Looks like a component/sub-detail of COGS rather than the main reported COGS line.

variables.notes: Used the main reported COGS line; avoided subcomponents to prevent double counting.

candidates.why: Dedicated operating expense bucket above EBIT; should be included in XSGA when separately reported so XSGA-XRD removes it.
Clear SG&A overhead component above EBIT.
Possible overhead component, but less comprehensive than the major functional expense rows.

variables.notes: R:nc. Candidate list misses the important overhead row 'Sales and distribution expenses', which is a clear SG&A component above EBIT and should be included alongside 'Administrative expenses' and 'Research and development expenses'. Chose outside candidate list to ensure full SG&A coverage. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Sales and distribution expenses

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above EBIT; best match.
R&D subcomponent, but prefer the explicit total R&D row.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D line exists above EBIT and is also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS so that XSGA-XRD removes R&D.

candidates.why: Primary recurring interest cost; best core match.
Recurring financing cost and should be included with interest expense.
Likely recurring finance costs, preferable to total financial expenses when using granular components.
Broader total that includes non-interest items; avoid when components are available.

variables.notes: R:nc. Used granular recurring finance cost rows instead of total 'Financial expenses'. Manual review needed because 'Interest Expense' appears twice in the income statement preview with the same exact label, creating ambiguity about which physical row is referenced.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to shareholders in Novozymes A/S
candidates.why: Preferred parent/shareholder equity line that excludes non-controlling interests.
Usable fallback only if parent equity line did not exist, but it includes NCI.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to shareholders in Novozymes A/S

variables.notes: Preferred owner-attributable equity line to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Direct NCI line on balance sheet and preferred label.
Alternate label for NCI that may be used in some years.

variables.notes: Selected balance-sheet NCI labels as a priority list; avoided income-statement minority rows.
